rows.question: What command shows the active experiment status?
rows.baseline_text:
What command shows the active experiment status?
Answer: To show the active experiment status, you can use the following command:

```
kubectl get experiments
```

This command will list all the experiments that are currently active in the Kubernetes cluster. Each experiment will display its name, status, and other relevant information.
